commands: SITE=$(docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'ls -1 /home/frappe/frappe-bench/sites | grep -vE "^(assets|apps.txt|common_site_config.json)$" | head -n1')
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site "'$SITE'" set-config -g host_name http://44.198.225.186'
docker exec frappe_docker-backend-1 bash -lc 'bench --site "'$SITE'" add-domain 44.198.225.186 || true'
